title: FilterLinkInstance
description: FilterLinkInstance: IRequest that filters all link instances with given file name/path, Name parameter value or ElementId from active Revit document. If link name field is left blank, all link instances in the document will be filtered.

LinkName.description: Name of the link file (alternatively whole file path, Name parameter value or ElementId) used to filter the Revit link instances. Optional: if left blank, all link instances in the document will be filtered.

CaseSensitive.description: If true: only perfect, case sensitive text match will be accepted. If false: capitals and small letters will be treated as equal.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
